repeat.condition: {{parameters.wait_for_completion && temp.status != 'succeeded' && temp.status != 'failed' && temp.status != 'cancelled' && now < addSeconds(temp.startedAt, ifempty(parameters.poll_timeout, 30))}}

valid.condition: {{!parameters.wait_for_completion || temp.status == 'succeeded' || temp.status == 'failed' || temp.status == 'cancelled' || now < addSeconds(temp.startedAt, ifempty(parameters.poll_timeout, 30))}}
valid.message: Polling timed out before the job reached a terminal status.
